query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS supervisores (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  chaveJ VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
  nome VARCHAR(150) NOT NULL,
  pctConsig DECIMAL(5,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  pctConsorcio DECIMAL(5,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  pctCc DECIMAL(5,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  pctOurocap DECIMAL(5,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  pctSeguro DECIMAL(5,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  pctDental DECIMAL(5,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ativo TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  createdAt BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  updatedAt BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0
)
